scripts.check: npm run biome:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.biome:check: biome check src/App.tsx src/main.tsx src/theme.ts src/styles.css src/components/QuestionCard.tsx src/components/DecisionCard.tsx src/components/ProjectCard.tsx playwright.config.ts tests/generative-ui.spec.ts
scripts.biome:write: biome check --write src/App.tsx src/main.tsx src/theme.ts src/styles.css src/components/QuestionCard.tsx src/components/DecisionCard.tsx src/components/ProjectCard.tsx playwright.config.ts tests/generative-ui.spec.ts
